questions: Which of {Mercedes-Benz Group AG}'s Tier-1 suppliers are based in North Korea?
disruption_analysis.summary: A geopolitical disruption in North Korea has affected the Aerospace industry, specifically impacting North Korea Aerospace Industries. and, including those of Mercedes-Benz Group AG.

decision_report.executive_summary: There are no disruptions affecting Mercedes-Benz Group AG's Tier-1 suppliers. All suppliers maintain standard monitoring based on zero disruptions caused by geopolitical events in North Korea.

action_summary.key_statistics: No Tier-1 suppliers impacted or requiring action.

risk_summary.recommendation: Maintain standard operations as no suppliers are affected.
